languages.text: {n}С громким лязгом две койки переворачиваются, отправляя лежащих на них еще живых пациентов вниз, в трупную яму. Один из них успевает коротко крикнуть, прежде чем его тело с хрустом падает на конвеерную ленту.{/n}

traits.locale_text: вы видите, как старых больных скидывают на конвеер трупов, а новые заступают в палаты.

languages.text: {n}With a loud clang, the two beds tip over, sending their still living occupants hurtling into the corpse pit. One of them screams briefly before his body lands on the conveyor belt with a crunch.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}С громким лязгом две койки переворачиваются, отправляя лежащих на них еще живых пациентов вниз, в трупную яму. Один из них успевает коротко крикнуть, прежде чем его тело с хрустом падает на конвеерную ленту.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}With a loud clang, the two beds tip over, sending their still living occupants hurtling into the corpse pit. One of them screams briefly before his body lands on the conveyor belt with a crunch.{/n}

{n}With a loud clang, two medical bunks inside the chambers tip over, sending the living patients lying on them down into the corpse pit. One of them screams briefly before his body falls onto the conveyor belt with a crunch.{/n}

{n}With a loud clang, two medical bunks inside the chambers tip over, sending the living patients lying on them down into the corpse pit. One of them screams briefly before his body falls onto the conveyor belt with a crunch.{/n}

languages.text: {n}大きな音がして、2つの医療用ベッドが倒れ、ベッドの上の患者が死体処理槽に転落する。そのうちの一人は、一瞬叫んだあと、コンベアベルトに落ちた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a loud clang, two medical bunks inside the chambers tip over, sending the living patients lying on them down into the corpse pit. One of them screams briefly before his body falls onto the conveyor belt with a crunch.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İki yatak, yüksek bir çınlama sesiyle devrilip üzerlerinde yatan sağ hastaları ceset çukuruna gönderiyor. İçlerinden biri, vücudu bir çatırtıyla konveyör bandına düşmeden önce kısa bir çığlık atıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a loud clang, the two beds tip over, sending their still living occupants hurtling into the corpse pit. One of them screams briefly before his body lands on the conveyor belt with a crunch.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İki yatak, yüksek bir çınlama sesiyle devrilip üzerlerinde yatan sağ hastaları ceset çukuruna gönderiyor. İçlerinden biri, vücudu bir çatırtıyla konveyör bandına düşmeden önce kısa bir çığlık atıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伴随着一声巨响，两张医疗床猛然倾斜，将床上活生生的病患抛入尸体处理坑。其中一人发出短暂凄厉的尖叫，随即伴随着断裂声，他的身体摔在传送带上。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a loud clang, the two beds tip over, sending their still living occupants hurtling into the corpse pit. One of them screams briefly before his body lands on the conveyor belt with a crunch.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伴随着一声巨响，两张医疗床猛然倾斜，将床上活生生的病患抛入尸体处理坑。其中一人发出短暂凄厉的尖叫，随即伴随着断裂声，他的身体摔在传送带上。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mit einem lauten Geräusch neigen sich die beiden Betten und befördern die noch lebenden Patienten in die Leichengrube. Einer der beiden schreit kurz auf, ehe sein Körper auf dem Förderband aufschlägt."{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a loud clang, the two beds tip over, sending their still living occupants hurtling into the corpse pit. One of them screams briefly before his body lands on the conveyor belt with a crunch.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem lauten Geräusch neigen sich die beiden Betten und befördern die noch lebenden Patienten in die Leichengrube. Einer der beiden schreit kurz auf, ehe sein Körper auf dem Förderband aufschlägt."

languages.text: {n}Les deux couchettes médicales basculent avec un fracas métallique, envoyant sans cérémonie leurs occupants encore vivants dans la fosse mortuaire. L'un d'entre eux pousse un dernier cri juste avant que son corps n’atterrisse sur le tapis roulant avec un bruit d'os fracturés.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a loud clang, the two beds tip over, sending their still living occupants hurtling into the corpse pit. One of them screams briefly before his body lands on the conveyor belt with a crunch.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les deux couchettes médicales basculent avec un fracas métallique, envoyant sans cérémonie leurs occupants encore vivants dans la fosse mortuaire. L'un d'entre eux pousse un dernier cri juste avant que son corps n’atterrisse sur le tapis roulant avec un bruit d'os fracturés.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Con un sonoro ruido metálico, las dos camas se vuelcan, enviando a sus ocupantes vivos al foso de cadáveres. Uno de ellos grita antes de que su cuerpo se estrelle contra la cinta transportadora con un crujido.{/n}
